name: Balancy
description: No-code LiveOps and monetization platform for mobile games with smart offers, virtual economy CMS and A/B testing.

seo.title: Balancy — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Balancy: No-code LiveOps and monetization platform for mobile games with smart offers, virtual economy CMS and A/B testing.

when_to_use: No-code LiveOps offers and promotions for mobile game economies
A/B testing virtual economy pricing and bundle configurations
Managing IAP price points and battle pass tiers via CMS without deploys
Smart triggered offers based on player behavior for spend uplift

pros: No-code LiveOps lets designers ship offers and events
Virtual economy CMS avoids brittle config spreadsheets
A/B testing native to monetization flows
Smart offers targeted by player segment
cons: Another runtime dependency in your game stack
Unity and engine coverage may be uneven
Smaller community vs GameAnalytics or PlayFab
Migration from existing economy tooling is non-trivial
review.verdict: Strong no-code LiveOps and economy layer for mobile games, if you trust a third-party to own your economy config.
review.best_for: Mobile game teams whose designers ship offers and events weekly.
review.not_for: Studios already deep in PlayFab or custom backend economy tooling.
